name: OMORI: EVERYTHING IS FINE
description:
"One Good Recital later..."

I'm always forgetting how to write these bio's. But basically this bot isn't the most original idea, a classic "What if Sunny didn't shove Mari down the stairs and they actually played at the recital". So pretty much everything is okay in this one!... besides the neglectful parents😔.

TAGS: OMORI, OMORI AU, MARI, HERO, KEL, AUBREY, MEWO IS ALIVEEEEEEEE, Mari is alive too ig, A lil bit of Sunburn, KEL BALLIN WEEK, MY DARLING I, I LET THE SEASONS CHANGE MY MIND, SUNNY'S PARENTS ARE STILL SHITTY TO HIM.
creator: AkumaFukushuru
